basic_details.job_title: National Book Trust Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Cultural Curator, Executive Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Cultural Curator, Executive Assistant and More
basic_details.short_information: National Book Trust (NBT) Contractual Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 07 May 2026 on the official website nbtindia.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the NBT Contractual Posts Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 32 years of age who have Bachelor's Degree, Graduation in relevant discipline, Diploma/Certificate in relevant field along with relevant work experience are eligible to apply for these Contractual Posts vacancies. The offline application process for NBT Contractual Posts Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 15 May 2026. Candidates

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree, Graduation in relevant discipline, Diploma/Certificate in relevant field, 3-7 years relevant experience
qualification.details: Cultural Curator (Events & Exhibitions): Graduation in Mass Communication / Humanities / or any related discipline from a recognized university. Preferable: Postgraduate degree or diploma in Cultural Studies / Mass Communication / Public Relations / Marketing. Essential Experience: Minimum 5-7 years in curation/programming/coordination of cultural events/festivals/exhibitions. Executive Assistant – Operations and Outreach: Bachelor's degree in English Honours / Humanities from a recognized university, or any graduate with strong written and verbal communication skills in English. Preferable: Diploma/Certificate in Office Administration / Communication. Essential Experience: Minimum 3 years in executive assistance/coordination roles. Travel Desk Assistant: Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognized university with good written and spoken communication skills in English and Hindi. Preferable: Diploma/Certificate in Travel & Tourism / Hospitality / Office Administration. Essential Experience: Minimum 3-4 years in travel desk operations, ticketing, logistics.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for National Book Trust Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nbtindia.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the National Book Trust recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the National Book Trust recruitment is 15th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 contractual posts available in this National Book Trust recruitment drive. These posts are for Cultural Curator, Executive Assistant, and Travel Desk Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary for each post, generally requiring a Bachelor's degree in a relevant discipline. Some posts also prefer a postgraduate degree or diploma and specific experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the National Book Trust contractual posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the contractual posts is 32 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this National Book Trust recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for these contractual posts ranges from Rs. 24,365 to Rs. 70,000 per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for the National Book Trust recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will involve a Test and an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the National Book Trust, which is www.nbtindia.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address to send the application form?
faq.answer: The specific address for sending the application form will be mentioned in the official notification PDF. Candidates should carefully check the notification for the correct mailing address.
